# Upgrade Roofs

> Professional roofing company based in Sandbach, Cheshire. CORC-certified, 25+ years experience, £10M public liability insurance. Emergency call-outs 24/7. Free quotes with no obligation.

## About
Upgrade Roofs (UPGRADE ROOFS LTD) is a family-run roofing contractor based at 20 Crewe Road, Sandbach, Cheshire, CW11 4NE. Founded in 1999. Principal contact: 01270 897606. Email: upgraderoofs@yahoo.com. Business hours: Mon–Fri 8am–6pm, Sat 9am–4pm.

Certifications: CORC (Confederation of Roofing Contractors), Freefoam Approved Installer, Marley Registered Installer. Insurance-Backed Guarantees (IBG) on all work. 10-year workmanship guarantee.

## Services
- Tile & Slate Roofing: https://www.upgraderoofs.co.uk/services/tile-slate-roofing
- Flat Roofing (EPDM/GRP): https://www.upgraderoofs.co.uk/services/flat-roofing
- Chimney Repairs: https://www.upgraderoofs.co.uk/services/chimney-repairs
- Gutters & Fascias: https://www.upgraderoofs.co.uk/services/gutters-fascias
- Skylights & Roof Windows: https://www.upgraderoofs.co.uk/services/skylights-roof-windows
- Cladding: https://www.upgraderoofs.co.uk/services/cladding
- Emergency Roofing (24/7): https://www.upgraderoofs.co.uk/emergency-roofing
- New Roofs & Re-Roofing: https://www.upgraderoofs.co.uk/new-roofs
- Roof Repairs: https://www.upgraderoofs.co.uk/roof-repairs

## Service Areas
Based in Sandbach (CW11), covering all of Cheshire and surrounding areas within 30 miles:
- Sandbach: https://www.upgraderoofs.co.uk/roofers-sandbach
- Crewe: https://www.upgraderoofs.co.uk/roofers-crewe
- Congleton: https://www.upgraderoofs.co.uk/roofers-congleton
- Nantwich: https://www.upgraderoofs.co.uk/roofers-nantwich
- Middlewich: https://www.upgraderoofs.co.uk/roofers-middlewich
- Alsager: https://www.upgraderoofs.co.uk/roofers-alsager
- Holmes Chapel: https://www.upgraderoofs.co.uk/roofers-holmes-chapel
- Winsford: https://www.upgraderoofs.co.uk/roofers-winsford
- Northwich: https://www.upgraderoofs.co.uk/roofers-northwich
- Macclesfield: https://www.upgraderoofs.co.uk/roofers-macclesfield
- Knutsford: https://www.upgraderoofs.co.uk/roofers-knutsford
- Tarporley: https://www.upgraderoofs.co.uk/roofers-tarporley
- Biddulph: https://www.upgraderoofs.co.uk/roofers-biddulph
- Newcastle-under-Lyme: https://www.upgraderoofs.co.uk/roofers-newcastle-under-lyme
- Wilmslow: https://www.upgraderoofs.co.uk/roofers-wilmslow
- All service areas: https://www.upgraderoofs.co.uk/service-areas

## Pricing (approximate, free written quotes provided)
- Terraced house re-roof: £5,000–£8,000
- Semi-detached re-roof: £6,500–£10,000
- Detached house re-roof: £8,000–£15,000+
- Flat roof replacement (garage/extension): £1,500–£4,000
- Chimney repoint: £300–£800
- Gutter replacement (full house): £500–£1,200
